meaning: Public Health Engineer 公共卫生工程师
examples: Practice has proved that implementing PHE can improve the effect of health education.
The results of fluorescence measurements show that there is a strong interaction between Py-Phe-DA and BSA .
But Public Health England (PHE) says the infections data is not conclusive, although it does recommend supplements.
Professor Debra Lapthorne from Public Health England (PHE) said "just one dose would give a 95% protection".
Paramount Home Entertainment (PHE) is part of Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment.
